languages.text: "Они бдительностью своей исполняют долг перед Богом-Императором".
"Their vigilance is the means by which they fulfil their duty to the God-Emperor."
languages.original_text: "Они бдительностью своей исполняют долг перед Богом-Императором".

traits.locale_text: "Their vigilance is the means by which they fulfil their duty to the God-Emperor."
"Their vigilance is the means by which they fulfil their duty to the God-Emperor."
"Their vigilance is the means by which they fulfil their duty to the God-Emperor."

languages.text: 「彼らの警戒は、神皇帝への彼らの義務を果たす手段である」
languages.original_text: "Their vigilance is the means by which they fulfil their duty to the God-Emperor."

languages.text: "Uyanıklıkları, Tanrı İmparator'a karşı vazifelerini yerine getirme biçimleridir."
languages.original_text: "Their vigilance is the means by which they fulfil their duty to the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: "Uyanıklıkları, Tanrı İmparator'a karşı vazifelerini yerine getirme biçimleridir."

languages.text: “他们的警惕，正是对神皇履职的方式。”
languages.original_text: "Their vigilance is the means by which they fulfil their duty to the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: “他们的警惕，正是对神皇履职的方式。”

languages.text: "Ihre Wachsamkeit ist das Mittel, mit dem sie ihrer Pflicht gegenüber dem Gottimperator nachkommen."
languages.original_text: "Their vigilance is the means by which they fulfil their duty to the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: "Ihre Wachsamkeit ist das Mittel, mit dem sie ihrer Pflicht gegenüber dem Gottimperator nachkommen."

languages.text: « C'est par leur vigilance qu'ils accomplissent leur devoir envers l'Empereur-Dieu. »
languages.original_text: "Their vigilance is the means by which they fulfil their duty to the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: « C'est par leur vigilance qu'ils accomplissent leur devoir envers l'Empereur-Dieu. »

languages.text: «Su vigilancia es su forma de cumplir su deber hacia el Dios Emperador».
languages.original_text: "Their vigilance is the means by which they fulfil their duty to the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: «Su vigilancia es su forma de cumplir su deber hacia el Dios Emperador».
